case_title: CALIFORNIA PERSONNEL RESOURCES, INC. VS DR. MORADI C/O STRESS CARE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,482.44 FILED BY CALIFORNIA PERSONNEL RESOURCES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DR. MORADI C/O STRESS CARE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DR. MORADI C/O STRESS CARE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA PERSONNEL RESOURCES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DR. MORADI C/O STRESS CARE $2,482.44 PRINCIPAL, $43.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,525.44 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DR. MORADI C/O STRESS CARE HEARING SET FOR JUN-22-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-22-1992, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA PERSONNEL RESOURCES, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DR. MORADI C/O STRESS CARE MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED JUDGMENT STATED ABOVE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA PERSONNEL RESOURCES, INC. HEARING SET FOR OCT-15-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF OCT-15-1992, DENIED
